title: scopolia orientalis
intro: Scopolia orientalis, also known as devil's trumpet, is a plant species in the family Scopoliaceae that is native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anticholinergic and antispasmodic effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as asthma, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Scopolia orientalis include its ability to relax muscles, reduce inflammation, and improve sleep quality. Scopolia orientalis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although its use should be carefully monitored due to potential side effects.
